metadata.title: Code Styler
metadata.description: Style and customize codeblocks and inline code in both editing mode and reading mode.

regex.source: name: "Reset fold state for all codeblocks"
regex.target: name: "重置所有代码块的折叠状态"

regex.source: text: "Settings for the Code Styler Plugin."
regex.target: text: "代码样式器插件设置（Fendi 2024-09-24 汉化）"

regex.source: text: "If you like this plugin, and would like to help support continued development, use the button below!"
regex.target: text: "如果你喜欢这个插件，并且想帮助支持继续开发，请使用下面的按钮！"

regex.source: .setDesc("Change dropdown to modify different groups of settings"
regex.target: .setDesc("更改下拉菜单以修改不同的设置组"

regex.source: .setDesc("Change dropdown to modify styles and settings of different codeblock sections"
regex.target: .setDesc("更改下拉菜单以修改不同代码块部分的样式和设置"

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, styling will be applied when exporting to PDF."
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，导出到 PDF 时将应用样式。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Create a new theme from the current settings."
.setDesc("Determines how rounded the codeblocks appear in pixels."
regex.target: .setDesc("确定代码块的四舍五入显示方式(以像素为单位)。"

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, languages with icons display a left border with the colour of the icon. The slider sets the width of the border."
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，带有图标的语言将显示与图标颜色相同的左边框。滑块设置边框的宽度。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose whether to unwrap lines in reading mode"
regex.target: .setDesc("选择是否在读取模式下展开线条"

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, in reading mode, holding click on a codeblock will wrap the lines for better visibility."
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，在阅读模式下，按住代码块将换行以获得更好的可见性。"

regex.source: .setDesc("If disabled, the below settings are disabled too."
regex.target: .setDesc("如果禁用，以下设置也将被禁用。"

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, highlights will also highlight the line numbers."
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，高亮显示还会高亮显示行号。"

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the current line number in codeblocks will be indicated with a separate colour."
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，代码块中的当前行号将用单独的颜色指示。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the font size for header language tags and titles."
regex.target: .setDesc("设置标题语言标记和标题的字体大小。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Style the header title text using bold and italic toggles, by setting a font or by setting a text colour."
regex.target: .setDesc("通过设置字体或设置文本颜色，使用粗体和斜体切换设置标题文本的样式。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Title placeholder text for folded code when no title parameter is set."
regex.target: .setDesc("未设置标题参数时折叠代码的标题占位符文本。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Colour of the line separating the codeblock header and the codeblock."
regex.target: .setDesc("分隔代码块标头和代码块的行的颜色。"

regex.source: .setDesc('Determine when to show language tags in the header. "Title Only" will only show language tags when the title parameter is set.'
regex.target: .setDesc('确定何时在页眉中显示语言标记。只有在设置了 Title 参数时，"Title Only"才会显示语言标记。'

regex.source: .setDesc('Determine when to show language icons where available. "Title Only" will only show language tags when the title parameter is set.'
regex.target: .setDesc('确定何时显示可用的语言图标。只有在设置了 Title 参数时，"Title Only"才会显示语言标记。'

regex.source: .setDesc("Style the header language tag text using bold and italic toggles, by setting a font or by setting a text colour."
regex.target: .setDesc("通过设置字体或设置文本颜色，使用粗体和斜体切换设置标题语言标记文本的样式。"

regex.source: .setDesc("If disabled, language icons will be black and white."
regex.target: .setDesc("如果禁用，语言图标将为黑色和白色。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the size of the displayed language icons."
regex.target: .setDesc("设置显示的语言图标的大小。"

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, highlights the active line inside codeblocks."
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，则高亮显示代码块内的活动行。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Define a new alternative highlight name. The colour can be modified after it is added."
regex.target: .setDesc("定义一个新的备选高亮显示名称。添加后可以修改颜色。"

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, highlights fade away to the right. The slider sets the gradient colour stop as a percentage."
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，高亮显示将向右逐渐消失。滑块将渐变色停止设置为百分比。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Define languages in a comma separated list which the plugin should not decorate. You can use a wildcard (*) either at the beginning, or at the end. For example: ad-* will exclude codeblocks where the language starts with ad- e.g.: ad-info, ad-error etc."
regex.target: .setDesc("在逗号分隔的列表中定义插件不应该修饰的语言。您可以在开头或结尾使用通配符(*)。例如:ad-*将排除语言以 ad 开头的代码块，例如:ad info, ad error 等。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Define languages in a comma separated list which the plugin should style despite being processed by another plugin. You can use a wildcard (*) either at the beginning, or at the end. For example: ad-* will exclude codeblocks where the language starts with ad- e.g.: ad-info, ad-error etc."
regex.target: .setDesc("在逗号分隔的列表中定义语言，尽管插件正在被另一个插件处理，但插件应该对其进行样式设置。您可以在开头或结尾使用通配符(*)。例如:ad-*将排除语言以 ad 开头的代码块，例如:ad info, ad error 等。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Use this textbox to redirect specific language colours and icons as a JSON with language names as keys and either a colour key, an icon key or both as the value for a given language. Colours should be passed as CSS colours and icons should be passed as a string of the inside of an svg element. This setting is theme independent."
regex.target: .setDesc("使用此文本框将特定语言的颜色和图标重定向为 JSON，语言名称作为键，颜色键, 图标键或两者都作为给定语言的值。颜色应该作为 CSS 颜色传递，图标应该作为 svg 元素内部的字符串传递。此设置与主题无关。"

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, in reading mode, inline code will be syntax highlighted based on a language set with `{language} highlighted_inline_code`. See the README for more information."
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，在读取模式下，内联代码将基于带有 `{language} highlighted_inline_code`的语言集进行语法高亮显示。有关更多信息，请参阅自述文件。"

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, inline code will be styled."
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，内联代码将被设置样式。"

regex.source: .setDesc("The text colour of inline code titles."
.setDesc("Determines how bold inline code titles appear."
regex.target: .setDesc("确定粗体内联代码标题的显示方式。"

regex.source: .setDesc("The text colour when editing inline code."
regex.target: .setDesc("编辑内联代码时的文本颜色。"
.setDesc("确定内联代码的粗体显示方式。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Determines how rounded inline code appear in pixels."
regex.target: .setDesc("确定四舍五入的内联代码以像素显示的方式。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Determines how much vertical inner padding in pixels inline code has."
regex.target: .setDesc("确定内联代码中像素的垂直内部填充量。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Determines how much horizontal inner padding in pixels inline code has."
regex.target: .setDesc("确定内联代码中像素的水平内部填充量。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Determines how much horizontal outer margin is added to the inline code in pixels."
regex.target: .setDesc("确定以像素为单位向内联代码添加的水平外部边距的大小。"

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, highlights the active line outside codeblocks."
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，则高亮显示代码块外的活动行。"

regex.source: .setDesc("This will return all inbuilt themes to the plugin defaults"
regex.target: .setDesc("这将使所有内置主题返回到插件默认值"

regex.source: .setDesc("Used for UI buttons like the copy code button."
regex.target: .setDesc("用于 UI 按钮，如复制代码按钮。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Parameters and language which would follow codeblock delimiter."
regex.target: .setDesc("代码块分隔符后面的参数和语言。"

regex.source: .setDesc("Text to render as example inside code delimiters."
regex.target: .setDesc("要在代码分隔符内作为示例呈现的文本。"

regex.source: .setDesc(`To highlight lines with this highlight, use the ${alternativeHighlightName} parameter.`
regex.target: .setDesc(`若要使用此高亮显示来高亮显示线条，请使用 ${alternativeHighlightName} 参数。`

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, external references will be updated automatically on load when possible.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，外部引用将在可能的情况下在加载时自动更新。")
